title: Refactored method of getting pods
body:
Now, for commands that have --latest and --all, the context flags are checked, and pods are grabbed in a single function

Signed-off-by: haircommander <pehunt@redhat.com>

comments.body: @haircommander Given that errors aren't actually fatal, I'm fine with that.
@haircommander Tests should be fixed on master, can you rebase?
